llm_result.summary: This plan targets modifiable BIO, PSYCHO, and SOCIAL levers to decrease acute somatic symptom intensity, reduce distress from unpredictability, lessen catastrophic threat interpretations, improve acceptance of medical reassurance, reduce avoidance of leaving home, and lessen overall functional impact. Leveraging interoceptive exposure, cognitive restructuring, graded exposure, mindfulness, psychoeducation, sleep and circadian regularity, gut-brain axis nutrition, physical activity, social support, and structured reassurance strategies, the approach combines single-lever changes with cross-domain interactions (e.g., improved sleep reduces arousal and interoceptive sensitivity; social support buffers distress). Each candidate maps to specific criteria (C01–C07), includes a practical measurement plan, time horizon, feasibility, expected impact, and safety notes. The plan emphasizes changeable predictors, practical implementation, and minimal safety risks while avoiding unsafe or non-modifiable actions.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured interoceptive exposure program (guided exercises to provoke heart rate, dizziness, and GI sensations in a controlled, progressive manner) with weekly homework
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Exposure to feared internal sensations in a controlled way reduces fear conditioning, decreases catastrophic interpretation, and lowers vigilance for bodily signals.
solutions.measurement: sessions_per_week; homework_completion_rate; daily symptom intensity ratings; interoceptive_habituation_score
solutions.safety_notes: Provide a clinician-guided protocol; monitor for panic or worsening dizziness; pause if severe symptoms occur; ensure safety during exercises
solutions.mapping_query: Interoceptive exposure lever mapped to reducing C01, C02, C06, and C03 through exposure-based fear reduction.

solutions.solution_candidate: Daily cognitive reappraisal practice with worksheets and micro-habits (CBT-based) to reinterpret bodily sensations as non-threatening
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reframing sensations lowers threat interpretations and catastrophic worry, reducing avoidance and distress
solutions.measurement: daily threat_appraisal_rating(0-100); practice_log; pre-post cognitive restructuring task scores
solutions.mapping_query: C02 and C03 can improve via enhanced cognitive reinterpretation; primarily targets C03.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured, gradual plan to increase safe excursions (home-to-store, then longer trips) with fear ratings and habituation logging
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Systematic exposure reduces avoidance learning and anticipatory distress when away from home, increasing tolerance of unpredictability
solutions.measurement: frequency/distance of trips; anticipatory anxiety ratings; avoidance_behavior_score
solutions.safety_notes: Coordinate with a trusted person; implement panic safety plan; avoid high-risk environments until confidence increases
solutions.mapping_query: Directly targets C05 with secondary reduction in C02 via increased exposure.

solutions.solution_candidate: 8-week mindfulness program focusing on nonjudgmental observation of sensations
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Nonjudgmental awareness reduces reactivity to bodily sensations, lowers threat appraisal, and diminishes interoceptive hypervigilance
solutions.measurement: days_of_practice_per_week; MAAS/FFMQ scores; symptom diary changes
solutions.mapping_query: Mindfulness reduces C02, C03, and C06 through attenuated interoceptive reactivity.

solutions.solution_candidate: Structured pre-visit brief for clinicians and patient-led questions; reassurance strategy documented in notes
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improved acceptance of test results and clinician communication reduces frustration and mistrust, mitigating symptom amplification
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure accuracy of information; avoid false reassurance; emphasize ongoing monitoring if symptoms persist
solutions.mapping_query: Directly addresses C04 by improving reassurance acceptance.

solutions.solution_candidate: Consistent sleep-wake times with light exposure management and bedtime routine to optimize circadian entrainment
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Regular sleep reduces autonomic arousal and interoceptive sensitivity, lowering somatic episode intensity and distress
solutions.measurement: sleep diary metrics (sleep onset, wake after sleep, naps); perceived sleep quality; next-day symptom rating
solutions.safety_notes: If sleep meds are used, coordinate; monitor caffeine intake; minimize screen exposure before bed
solutions.mapping_query: Sleep regularity improves C01 and reduces C02/C06 via reduced arousal.

solutions.solution_candidate: Dietary pattern emphasizing fiber, fermented foods, hydration; micronutrient sufficiency; consider gut microbiome-friendly plan
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Modulating GI function and gut microbiota may reduce GI symptom intensity and autonomic arousal linked to somatic episodes
solutions.safety_notes: Consult nutritionist if GI symptoms worsen; assess for intolerances
solutions.mapping_query: Leverages GI-brain axis to influence C01 somatic intensity.

solutions.solution_candidate: Moderate aerobic activity 3-4x/week with paced breathing integration
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Exercise reduces autonomic arousal, improves mood, and lowers somatic symptom frequency; paced breathing supports autonomic regulation
solutions.measurement: sessions_per_week; perceived exertion; HRV metrics; symptom diary
solutions.safety_notes: Screen for contraindications; progress gradually; consult clinician if chest pain or dizziness intensifies
solutions.mapping_query: Physical activity as a lever to reduce C01-C06 by improving autonomic regulation and mood.

solutions.solution_candidate: Facilitated peer-support group or family involvement plan with scheduled regular check-ins
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Social support buffers distress, reduces avoidance, and increases tolerance of unpredictable symptoms
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure group safety; monitor for social stress; clarify boundaries and expectations
solutions.mapping_query: Support networks reduce C02 and C05 through emotional buffering and accountability.

solutions.solution_candidate: Psychoeducation module explaining autonomic arousal, normal bodily sensations, and interpretation of medical tests
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Increases acceptance of reassurance by improving understanding of mechanisms; reduces misinterpretation and mistrust
solutions.measurement: quiz_scores; satisfaction_with_information; post-education symptom appraisal change
solutions.safety_notes: Use accessible language; avoid medical jargon; ensure content is evidence-based
solutions.mapping_query: Education lever targeting C04 by improving understanding of bodily symptoms and reassurance acceptability.
